name: Nodens
description: Personal strategic HQ: Next.js web + Node API + Postgres, running as the nodens-live Docker Compose stack.

migration.rollback: Keep /home/oreo/nodens intact. Use /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/scripts/release.sh with the previous merged SHA; the release command restores the prior Compose build and verifies readiness.
notes: Running as Docker Compose project nodens-live from /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/compose.yml.
Web and API bind only to 127.0.0.1 on ports 3000 and 3001; Tailscale Serve provides tailnet-only HTTPS on port 8443.
Postgres is not published on a host port and uses the nodens-live_postgres-data named volume.
Canonical Oreo Cloud source migration into /srv/oreo-cloud/workloads/nodens/source is still pending.
Release, health, backup, restore, and client-replica procedures are documented in /home/oreo/nodens/deploy/README.md.

requirements: Nodens owns backup execution; Oreo Cloud records and validates the operator contract but does not expose a dashboard backup action.
The server timer retains 14 daily dumps and 8 weekly snapshots; every dump has a checksum and must pass an isolated restore drill.

notes: Handles personal life, work, relationship, and risk data per the project README.
Web and API bind to 127.0.0.1 only; Tailscale Serve terminates tailnet-only HTTPS on port 8443.
Postgres is not published on a host port in the nodens-live Compose stack.
